positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a whimsical celestial forest scene. The composition features a central, glowing crescent moon hanging among giant bioluminescent mushrooms and weeping willows. Stars are stylized as geometric constellations, and soft nebula clouds swirl in deep sapphire and vibrant turquoise hues. Focus on strong silhouette contrast against the soft glow of the magical flora. The overall mood is dreamy, mystical, and elegant. Vector art style, clean lines, high contrast, designed for screen printing, minimalist complexity.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, cropped, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, oversaturated, messy, photorealism, disfigured
